docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED DEC-04-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, KEVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF KEVIN MURPHY APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EVON SAHALEH. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 [SC-100 STAMPED: "FILED BY FAX' FILED BY MURPHY, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT RE: CIRCUMSTANCES SURROUNDING NON-APPEARANCE AT COURT HEARING. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURPHY, KEVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAHALEH, EVON PLAINTIFF MAY NOT SEEK ADDITIONAL DAMAGES FOR EVENTS UNDERLYING PRIOR CASE (CSM-23-866841). PLANTIFF ALSO DID NOT MEET REQUIREMENTS OF CA. CIV. CODE 1719(A)(2) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2024 - JUDGMENT.
